title: Theo's Sleepy Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Little Theo plays a gentle peek-a-boo game with his sleepy animal friends as bedtime approaches, finding each one hiding behind soft blankets and cozy curtains.

pages.text: Where is Bunny? Peek-a-boo! Behind the soft blue blanket!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes peeks around a lifted blue blanket flap, revealing a sleepy white bunny underneath
illustration.alt: Theo lifting a blue blanket to reveal a bunny

pages.text: Where is Teddy? Peek-a-boo! Behind the yellow curtain!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes pulls back a yellow curtain flap, discovering a brown teddy bear hiding behind it
illustration.alt: Theo opening a yellow curtain to find a teddy bear

pages.text: Where is Kitty? Peek-a-boo! Under the pink pillow!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes lifts a pink pillow flap, revealing an orange kitten curled up underneath for sleep
illustration.alt: Theo lifting a pillow to find a sleeping kitten

pages.text: Now Theo is sleepy too. Peek-a-boo! Time for bed! Good night!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes tucked in bed with a white sheet flap partially covering him, surrounded by all his animal friends
illustration.alt: Theo in bed with his animal friends, ready for sleep

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: Where was Bunny hiding?
questions.explanation: Bunny was hiding behind the soft blue blanket!

questions.question: What color was the curtain?
questions.explanation: The curtain where Teddy was hiding was yellow!

questions.question: What did everyone do at the end?
questions.explanation: Everyone got sleepy and went to bed for the night!
